notes: Transitions to jab 3 as early as frame 8 and rapid as early as frame 7
Transitions to F-tilt 2 as early as frame 12
Head intangibility on frame 16-17. Charge hold is frame 5
Head intangibility on frame 12-18. Charge hold is frame 6
Autocancels on frame 22 onward. Head and stem intangibility 7—9.

To blow away is 41 total frames. Earliest you can blow away is on 22. Endlag is 18 if projectile makes contact. Eating projectile is 44 frames or 30 if it's close to you. Ptooie can eat a single attack of up to 10% while hovering before being knocked down (like damage based armor but for a projectile).
10 frames to enter charge state, 11 startup from charge. Hitbox lasts 82 frames at no charge. Cloud grows from frame 1-25 and slowly moves, stops moving on frame 45. Wind box 12-25.

move: Side B, Full Charge (Poison Breath, Full Charge)
notes: Cloud deals damage every 4 frames at first then every 7 towards the end. Hitbox lasts 122 frames. Takes 95 frames to reach full charge. Takes 2 frames to cancel charge with hield. Cloud grows from frame 1-25 and slowly moves, stops moving on frame 75. Wind box 12-25.
16-55/56-61/62-67 are rehitting hitboxes, rehit rate of 6.

Startup is 2 upon reaching target. Reaches full charge on frame 78. Takes 18 frames to enter charge state Endlag on hit is 39, or 49 if you tipped over. Endlag on whiff is 49 or 59 if you tipped over. Head intangibility begins on frame 3 of travel or frame 1 of reaching a target, whichever comes first. Pot damage-based armor begins on frame 18, 15% (18% in 1v1).
Occurs whenever Piranha Plant is footstooled while crouching.
